arts.ttl: Tottenham force Man United into major kit change for the Europa League final due to 64-year-old tradition
arts.sum: Tottenham have forced Manchester United into a major kit change ahead of the Europa League final because of a tradition that dates back 64 years.

arts.ttl: Tottenham vs Man United Prediction: Team News, Predicted Lineups and Where To Watch
arts.sum: Tottenham and Man Utd face off in the Europa League final at San Mames on Wednesday, May 21st, at 20:00 GMT, with the home side seeking to end their wait for silverware. Tottenham vs Man United Form ...

arts.ttl: 'Convinced he was Spurs-bound' - How Fernandes became Man Utd's heart
arts.sum: As Bruno Fernandes leads Man Utd out against Tottenham in the Europa League final, BBC Sport look at his journey - including almost signing for Spurs.

arts.ttl: Europa League final predicted XIs as Spurs and Man Utd get differing injury updates
arts.sum: Manchester United and Tottenham come together in Bilbao on Wednesday evening in the Europa League final with both Rubem Amorim and Ange Postecoglou facing tricky decisions

arts.ttl: Wednesday’s briefing: De Bruyne farewell as Man Utd and Spurs prepare for final
arts.sum: Elsewhere, Leicester were charged with alleged breaches of financial rules.

arts.ttl: Amorim: 'Hard to explain' pressure on Postecoglou
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim said it's "hard to explain" why he is not under the same pressure at Manchester United as his Tottenham counterpart Ange Postecoglou ahead of the Europa League final despite both teams suffering similarly miserable Premier League campaigns.

arts.ttl: Rio Ferdinand reveals key Man Utd worry for Tottenham Europa League final
arts.sum: Manchester United are desperate to end their season with silverware as they gear up for a crucial Europa League final against Tottenham, with both teams coming into the clash in poor form

arts.ttl: Video footage shows Man United and Tottenham fans violently clashing in San Sebastian - 48 miles from Europa League final venue in Bilbao
arts.sum: Thousands of supporters of each side have flown out to the Spanish City for the game, which will define the seasons of the two sides, who sit 16th and 17th in the Premier League respectively.

arts.ttl: Key quotes from Ruben Amorim's pre-Spurs Europa League final press conference
arts.sum: “A new future, for me it is not the case but it is going to help us to finish the season, if people will look at our team in a different way because winning a European title is really important. The players know, everyone knows, the fans know, the staff know but winning a European title can help us have that feeling to build the future.”

arts.ttl: Tottenham and Manchester United's Europa League final is glory or bust for the Premier League's damned, writes OLIVER HOLT
arts.sum: OLIVER HOLT IN BILBAO: United and Spurs have been so poor, it is difficult to know whether to be proud two English teams have reached a major European final, or to be embarrassed.
